title: Private Jets Are Scarce. Blame the Gusher of AI Wealth
summary: After Bill Papariella, a Fort Lauderdale, Fla.–based entrepreneur, sold his private jet charter business for nearly $1 billion in 2022, he took it easy for a couple years.
